news.title: Passionate about mental health? Here are some top career options!
news.summary_en: From a therapist to a psychiatric nurse, here are a few top mental health careers that will allow you to help others in a meaningful way.

news.title: UNI expands cybersecurity, business and engineering programs with new online and hybrid offerings
news.summary_en: UNI is expanding several high‑demand programs by adding new online and hybrid options, including the Business Teaching BA, Cybersecurity & System Administration BS and the Applied Engineering: Applied Systems Engineering Management MS. These flexible pathways give working and place‑bound students greater access to UNI’s high‑quality instruction.

news.title: Wilson celebrates student achievement at annual leadership event
news.summary_en: From top academic performers to standout entrepreneurs, the Wilson College of Business Leadership Celebration honored the students who are leading, achieving and making a real impact — on campus and beyond.

news.title: What is ABSN? Your guide to accelerated nursing education
news.summary_en: Here’s what you should know if you’re looking at accelerated BSN programs and trying to figure out what works best for you!
